title: P9 (QUA-1024) OWNER escalation - enable budget hard-stops + ingest Codex cost-events
description:
## Why this is OWNER-class

Budgets are a company-policy lever (cost ceiling + tier classification). The CEO cannot unilaterally enable hard-stops because they affect every paid-tier agent's ability to run. Surfacing per CEO scope guardrails (DL-017): 'budget step-changes - anything materially raising monthly token/compute spend beyond the existing operating envelope'. Symmetric: enabling hard-stops is also OWNER-class.

## State today

- `spentMonthlyCents=0` for all 22 agents (CoS audit).
- `app/server/src/services/budgets.ts:716-862` is wired but no policy is set.
- Token-Controller cannot do its job: it runs every 2h and finds nothing because no spend is ever recorded against any agent.

## Asks for OWNER

1. **PATCH `/api/companies/{id}/budgets`** for Anthropic-tier agents (CEO/Research/Doc-KM/CoS/Quality-*) with:
   - `monthlyLimitCents`: TBD by OWNER per tier (suggest CEO=70000, others=20000-30000 as opening bid).
   - `hardStopEnabled`: true.
   - `softWarnPct`: 80.
2. **Codex spend ingest:** extract from `data/instances/default/companies/<id>/codex-home/state_5.sqlite` and feed via POST `/companies/{id}/cost-events` per `app/doc/SPEC-implementation.md:530, 681-695`.
3. **Token-Controller mode change:** convert from polling (2h cron) to threshold-breach reactive — wakes on `/api/cost-events` POST when soft/hard threshold crossed. Reduces 80 runs/h to ~0 baseline.

## What CEO has done

- Disabled Token-Controller-2 (duplicate) and reduced Token-Controller heartbeat (P2 above).
- Disabled Gmail-Monitor and Controlling-Agent (deferred phases).
- This issue documents the gap; CEO awaits OWNER decision before any further token-spend related agent changes.

## Acceptance

- OWNER posts policy on this issue (per-tier monthly limits, hardstop yes/no, softwarn pct).
- Codex cost-events ingestion script lives in `paperclip/tools/ops/codex_cost_ingest.py` and runs nightly.
- 24h after rollout: `spentMonthlyCents > 0` for all paid-tier agents; Token-Controller runs only on threshold-breach wakes.

## References

- Parent: QUA-1024.
- Source: `app/server/src/services/budgets.ts:716-862`.
- Spec: `app/doc/SPEC-implementation.md:530, 681-695`.
- Codex state DB: `data/instances/default/companies/<id>/codex-home/state_5.sqlite`.
